string 2: Do you think my friend will be okay? Well, do you?!

Okay, try explaining it to us again. Someone attacked you
and you ran away?

That's right. I was playing by the sea with my friend when
something scared us!

We're not familiar with this world, so we're not sure what 
might've happened, either.
{next}Can I help you?
{next}Tell me more about what happened.
{next}Did you do something wrong?

It's you! I'm glad to see you again! We could really use 
your help!

Oh, it's you! Yes, we don't have very much information, 
either...

That's no way to greet someone. We just happened to get
caught up in this ourselves.

This young'un got separated from its friend down by the sea.
It seems they were attacked.

W-Well, if the friend didn't get away in time, it's probably a 
goner by now.
No! Don't say that! I refuse to believe it!

You mustn't say such things, Gabumon! We should be trying to
help these kids.
{next}Let's go find the friend.
{end}Well, good luck to you.

Yes, the more we have searching, the better! We can
definitely use your help!

Why are you so cold and detached? I mean, I guess it doesn't
directly concern you, but...

Will you help us search for the lost child in the Abyss
Area?
{next}Let's go find their friend.
{end}Well, good luck to you.

Yes, the more we have searching, the better! We can
definitely use your help!

Why are you so cold and detached? I mean, I guess it doesn't
directly concern you, but...

Okay! We'll go on ahead! Remember! We'll be searching down 
by the sea!
Uh-oh... I-I'm scared! Someone, help me!

Looks like we've been seen... I really would've preferred to
keep this quiet!

Ah, perfect timing! I think we found what those children 
were afraid of!

This is quite the chore... Next time, let's take care of 
things properly from the start!
Thanks! Now I can get back to my friend!
Wait... Where is my friend? Please tell me they're okay!
Hey, kid... Try to calm down.

We'll take you to Central Town. Come on!
Let's get going!
Oh, look! It's my friend!
I was so scared! *sobbing*

There sure is lotsa crying going on here. Well, I suppose
it's understandable...
I'm just glad they're reunited!

Thanks for your help, everyone! Here. You can have this! We
found it on the ground!

You take it. I'm not sure if we'd be able to get much use 
out of such a thing.

I'm more curious about what those Titans you drove off 
were up to...

There are many strange things going on in this world, so 
we'll keep investigating.
